idea.title: Glyph Lock
idea.hook: Decode today's emoji-rebus phrase in three guesses; share your guess trail like Wordle.
idea.prototype: Daily seed generates a 3-glyph phrase rendered as a row of canvas-drawn pictograms. Tap a 12-glyph palette to fill the row, submit for per-position green/yellow/grey feedback. Three guesses. Share-string of colour squares on win.
idea.why_novel: No Wordle-style daily puzzle in portfolio; pictogram glyphs make it language-neutral; pure brain-budget pressure with no clock.
idea.lose_condition: Three incorrect phrase guesses without matching the daily target

sources.title: daily-puzzle signal
sources.snippet: Daily shareable puzzles with leaderboards work in any language.

sources.title: global-hook patterns
sources.snippet: Tier-1 global-hook signal: constrained phrase dictionaries enable language-free play.

sources.title: daily-share format
sources.snippet: Wordle-style colour-square share strings drive organic distribution.

synthesizer_brief: Daily-share puzzle in a language-neutral format with 3-guess budget pressure
